title: humboltia phyllocardia
intro: Humboltia phyllocardia, also known as Humboldtia phyllocardia, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Humboltia phyllocardia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are commonly used, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures.
